---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in the planner or dashboard
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Safe Reproduction

- Command run:
- Environment: OS, Python version, dependency versions, and browser version when relevant:
- Sample schema: list column names and separators only. Do not attach private POI or location data.
- Minimal non-sensitive reproduction steps:

## Actual Result

Include the full traceback or log excerpt with credentials, paths, and private coordinates removed.

## Expected Result

Describe the expected coverage behavior, site count, assignment behavior, or visualization result.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots only after removing sensitive labels, coordinates, and operational data.
